parameters.query:
SELECT * FROM campaigns
WHERE id = $1::uuid
   OR (status = 'draft' AND ($1::text IS NULL OR $1::text = ''))
ORDER BY created_at ASC
LIMIT 1;

UPDATE campaigns
SET status = 'blocked_missing_info',
    blocked_reason = $2
WHERE id = $1::uuid
RETURNING id, status, blocked_reason;

INSERT INTO agent_actions_log (agent_name, action_type, entity_type, entity_id, payload, result)
VALUES (
  'campaign_strategist',
  'block_missing_info',
  'campaign',
  $1::uuid,
  $2::jsonb,
  'blocked_missing_info'
)
RETURNING id;

options.queryReplacement: ={{ [$('Validate Critical Inputs').item.json.campaign.id, JSON.stringify({ missing_fields: $('Validate Critical Inputs').item.json.missing_fields, message: $('Validate Critical Inputs').item.json.message })] }}

parameters.responseBody: ={{ { ok: false, status: 'blocked_missing_info', campaign_id: $('Validate Critical Inputs').item.json.campaign.id, missing_fields: $('Validate Critical Inputs').item.json.missing_fields, message: $('Validate Critical Inputs').item.json.message } }}

parameters.query:
INSERT INTO campaign_strategies (
  campaign_id, positioning, key_messages, channels, posting_cadence, content_pillars, raw_strategy
) VALUES (
  $1::uuid, $2, $3::jsonb, $4::jsonb, $5::jsonb, $6::jsonb, $7::jsonb
)
ON CONFLICT (campaign_id) DO UPDATE SET
  positioning = EXCLUDED.positioning,
  key_messages = EXCLUDED.key_messages,
  channels = EXCLUDED.channels,
  posting_cadence = EXCLUDED.posting_cadence,
  content_pillars = EXCLUDED.content_pillars,
  raw_strategy = EXCLUDED.raw_strategy,
  created_at = now()
RETURNING *;
UPDATE campaigns SET status = 'strategy_ready', blocked_reason = NULL WHERE id = $1::uuid RETURNING id, status;

INSERT INTO agent_actions_log (agent_name, action_type, entity_type, entity_id, payload, result)
VALUES (
  'campaign_strategist',
  'create_strategy',
  'campaign',
  $1::uuid,
  $2::jsonb,
  'success'
);
INSERT INTO event_outbox (event_type, payload, target_agent, status)
VALUES (
  'strategy_ready',
  $2::jsonb,
  'agent_2',
  'pending'
)
RETURNING id;

options.queryReplacement: ={{ [ $('Parse Strategy JSON').item.json.campaign.id, JSON.stringify({ campaign_id: $('Parse Strategy JSON').item.json.campaign.id, strategy_id: $('Upsert Strategy').item.json.id }) ] }}

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ event: 'strategy_ready', campaign_id: $('Parse Strategy JSON').item.json.campaign.id, strategy_id: $('Upsert Strategy').item.json.id }) }}

parameters.responseBody: ={{ { ok: true, status: 'strategy_ready', campaign_id: $('Parse Strategy JSON').item.json.campaign.id, strategy_id: $('Upsert Strategy').item.json.id, strategy: $('Parse Strategy JSON').item.json.data } }}

parameters.query:
UPDATE campaigns
SET status = 'blocked_missing_info',
    blocked_reason = $2
WHERE id = $1::uuid;
INSERT INTO agent_actions_log (agent_name, action_type, entity_type, entity_id, payload, result)
VALUES ('campaign_strategist','llm_blocked_missing_info','campaign',$1::uuid,$3::jsonb,'blocked_missing_info')
RETURNING id;

parameters.responseBody: ={{ { ok: false, status: 'blocked_missing_info', campaign_id: $('Parse Strategy JSON').item.json.campaign.id, details: $('Parse Strategy JSON').item.json.data } }}
